name: github trending
goal: mở chrome rồi vào github trending, chọn qua tab developer rồi chọn developer đầu tiên để xem chi tiết

steps.description: Click on the Chrome app icon to open it.
Dismiss the Chrome notification prompt by clicking 'No thanks'.
Type github.com/trending into the search bar
Submit the search query to navigate to github.com/trending

Since the element ID for the 'Developers' tab is not directly visible in the provided list, I will click on the area where the 'Developers' button is typically located on the GitHub Trending page, assuming it has loaded.
Navigating directly to the developers trending page to bypass the need to click the tab, as it might not be rendering as an interactive element in the current UI tree.
Submit the URL to load the GitHub Trending Developers page.
